compiled_state.title: [scan-config-keys.sh]: .claude/worktrees/ inclusion -> spurious undocumented-key failures
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** Sub-Agent Blocker

#### Expected Behavior

scan-config-keys.sh should exclude .claude/worktrees/ from its scan because that directory contains ephemeral test fixtures (created by test-merge-worktree-compat.sh), not real plugin code that reads config keys.

#### Actual Behavior

scan-config-keys.sh walks the entire .claude/ directory tree, including .claude/worktrees/. When test-merge-worktree-compat.sh leaves a stale worktree (due to test interruption), the test fixture files inside it contain config key patterns (grep '^key=', _read_config_key, etc.) that are falsely flagged as undocumented. This causes test-config-keys-documented.sh to fail locally even though the keys are not real plugin config keys.

Fixed by: excluding .claude/worktrees/ from scan_tree traversal in scan-config-keys.sh + adding test_scan_config_keys_excludes_worktrees to test-scan-config-keys.sh.
